User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the PeerJudge application, typically an administrator who creates and manages rooms.

name.description: The display name of the user.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a single peer judging session or classroom room created by an administrator.

title.description: An optional title or name for the room, set by the admin.

adminId.description: Reference to the User who created and administrates this room.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the room was created.

status.description: The current status of the room.

isLocked.description: Whether the room is locked and prevents new participants from joining.

activePerformerIds.description: List of IDs of performance documents for the currently active performers.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp when the room was soft-deleted or moved to the recycle bin.

RoomParticipant.title: RoomParticipant
RoomParticipant.description: Tracks a participant within a specific judging room session. This is a persistent record of their joining.

name.description: The name entered by the participant for this specific session.

registerNumber.description: A unique identifier for the participant (e.g., student ID), used to prevent duplicate active sessions.

role.description: The role of the participant in this room, e.g., 'judge' or 'admin'.

status.description: The current online status of the participant.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the participant joined the room.

nameSource.description: Indicates whether the name was verified from the roster or entered manually.

Performance.title: Performance
Performance.description: Represents a single performance within a room, including scores and status.

performerName.description: The name of the person performing.

voters.description: A map of judge UIDs to their given scores.

totalScore.description: The sum of all scores given.

voteCount.description: The number of judges who have voted.

status.description: The current status of the performance.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the performance was created.

startedAt.description: The timestamp when the performance started.

IssueReport.title: IssueReport
IssueReport.description: Represents a technical issue reported by a judge during a session.

judgeName.description: The name of the judge reporting the issue.

judgeId.description: The auth UID of the reporting judge.

customMessage.description: An optional detailed description if 'OTHER' is selected.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the report was submitted.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles, primarily for administrators.
Stores individual judging room configurations. The document ID (`roomId`) is the public-facing, human-readable room code. This top-level collection allows for efficient lookup by code.
Stores the record of each participant who joins a room.

params.name: roomId
params.description: The unique identifier of the room.

params.name: participantId
params.description: The unique user ID of the participant.

definition.description: Stores individual performance records for a given room, including votes and scores.
Stores technical issue reports submitted by judges.

firestore.reasoning: Extended to support multiple active performers per room.
